How It Works
1
Discover Vendors

Search for wedding vendors by location using Google Places API

2
Import Reviews

Pull in Google reviews for each vendor automatically

3
Generate Videos

Create elegant 15-30s clips with TTS and wedding-style templates

4
Post to Social

Publish directly to TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts
